channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Microsoft Office Updates: Latest Features and Security Fixes
item.description: Stay up-to-date with the latest Microsoft Office version updates, featuring new features, bug fixes, and security patches.
item.dc:creator: Major Digest

item.title: Defense Commissary Agency Balances Cybersecurity and Customer Experience
item.description: Defense Commissary Agency (DeCA) strives to achieve a balance between cybersecurity and customer experience by leveraging native cloud security tools, enhancing interoperability with private sector services, viewing OT and IT through the same lens, and implementing automated technology.
item.dc:creator: Major Digest
